# 1099Deductions
> Complete 1099 tax deductions guide for US independent contractors 2026. IRS mileage 72.5¢/mile, SE tax 15.3%, QBI 20% deduction. Covers DoorDash, Uber, Instacart, Airbnb, OnlyFans, all platforms.

## Key Pages
- / : 1099 tax deductions hub 2026
- /quarterly-tax-guide-2026.html : Quarterly tax deadlines Apr 15, Jun 16, Sep 15, Jan 15
- /1099-tax-deductions-list.html : Complete 1099 deductions list 2026
- /self-employed-tax-deductions-checklist.html : Self-employed tax deductions checklist
- /obbba-tax-changes-2026.html : OBBBA 2026 tax changes — $2,000 threshold, $25,000 tips
